title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_blame
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_blame' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the file to blame.

ref.description: Optional commit-ish (SHA, branch, tag) to blame at.

startLine.description: First line of the range to blame (1-based). Requires endLine.

endLine.description: Last line of the range to blame (1-based, inclusive). Requires startLine.
